title: trifolium praetermissum
intro: Trifolium praetermissum, also known as the overlooked or forgotten clover, is a species of clover that belongs to the legume family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Trifolium praetermissum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Trifolium praetermissum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
